Other Services
Commission Tier Rates
Set the commission percentage paid at each monthly send-volume tier. Saved with your settings.
Users & Tab Permissions
Create staff logins and tick exactly which tabs each person can access. They sign in with their own username/password and only see what you allow.
☁️ Cloud Sync (Supabase)
Your data syncs to the cloud automatically as you work — survives cache clears and syncs across devices. localStorage stays the fast local copy.
Cloud sync enabled
Turn off to work fully offline
Browser Storage Usage
Backup & Restore
Download a full backup of all app data as a single file, or restore from one. Keep regular backups until cloud sync is enabled.

Import Agents from Excel
Upload your Excel file — new agents are added, existing ones (matched by Agent ID) are updated
📥
Download Template First
Required columns: Agent ID · Legacy ID · DBA Name · Owner Name · Tax ID · Teller IDs · City · Telephone · Email · Status
Column mapping (row 1 = headers, row 2+ = data):
A — Agent ID (8 digits, required) F — Teller IDs (comma-separated) B — Legacy ID (6 digits, required) G — City C — DBA / Business Name H — Telephone D — Owner Full Name I — Email E — Tax ID (NIF, 9 digits) J — Status (Active/Inactive/Pending)
📊

Drag & drop Excel file here, or click to browse

.xlsx or .xls — max 10MB
